description: Vercel is a cloud platform for building, deploying, and operating web applications and AI-powered workloads. It provides hosting, deployment, project management, and related developer tooling for teams and individual developers.
summary: Vercel exposes a bearer-token authenticated REST API at `https://api.vercel.com`, an OAuth-protected remote MCP server at `https://mcp.vercel.com/`, and the `vercel` CLI with interactive login and token-based non-interactive auth.
